rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the redundant `change` in `comul_includeRight`, but Review 2 additionally catches the deeper structural issue in `antipode_comp` (the `let u` defeq trick at line 31–33) and the undocumented `simp` chain at line 183 — following Review 2 would produce a more robust proof. Its critiques of the private `map_id`/`map_comp` induction proofs are less critical, but do not make the resulting PR worse.
